summary: How do employees submit a service request?
body:
## What to prepare
Use the service portal and choose the relevant request type.

## Before submitting
Confirm that the request is within the service team's published scope.

## Status
The guide does not promise a response time, so follow the portal status instead of assuming a deadline.
sourceExcerpt: Submit requests through the employee service portal. Select the appropriate request type and provide the required information. Service availability and response time depend on the request category.
sourceDescription: Example employee service guide used for the local demonstration.
